episode_title: AI is being judged by work, not demos
selected_story_title: AI is being judged by work, not demos
selection_reason: This is the strongest edition-wide signal because it changes how people should evaluate AI tools in practice: not by excitement, but by completed work, cost, reliability, and real workflow impact. That is immediately useful for creators and small businesses.
first_spoken_line: A useful shift happened this week, and it is not another flashy model launch. It is a change in how AI is being judged.
final_spoken_line: So the headline for today is not that AI got smarter. It is that the bar is moving. The question is no longer only, “Can it do the task?” The question is, “Can it do useful work well enough that a person can trust the result after review?” That is the standard that will shape the next phase of AI adoption.
